plugin.name: spatial
plugin._long: Unified window and workspace spread: a window spread that escalates to a zoomed workspace wall.

option.name: windows-spread
option._long: Toggle the window spread of the current workspace.

option.name: workspaces-spread
option._long: Show the workspaces spread; escalates from the window spread if already open.

option.name: duration
option._long: How long the open, close, settle and wall zoom animations last.

option.name: gap-color
option._long: Color filling the gaps between and around the workspace cells.
